Internal status update — Q2 planning

The project status is green and the project plan is on track for the next sprint.
The buyer agreement framework will be reviewed next quarter; no specific buyer has
been identified. There is no material adverse impact expected on revenue.

Our team's mac mini setup remains the dev environment; no MAC clause concerns.

Andrew Goh is the project lead. Andrew has been working on the documentation.
The schedule meeting is on Friday.
